texts.full_text: elevision personality, Nina Garcia. The two discuss the art of fashion editing as well as her journey from being a stylist to an industry influencer. Meanwhile, at the National Board of Canvassers in Manila, election results for the May 2013 party list winners are announced by Commission on Elections (COMELEC) Chairman Sixto Brillantes Jr., marking significant political changes within the Philippines. texts.full_text: evaluated. SBG ethanol extracts (SBGEEs) at 6.25 mg/mL showed antiviral activities against coliphage MS2 and hepatitis A virus. The SBG 80% ethanol extract (SBG80%EE) exhibited the lowest minimum inhibitory concentrations (MIC) and minimum bactericidal concentrations (MBC) against six baicalensis Georgi is a plant that has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in Chinese medicine. The study aimed to investigate different ethanol extraction methods on SBG roots' chemical composition influence while exploring their antimicrobial towards various pathogens and fresh produce like tomatoes (Solanum lycopersicum).
